case_title: ROWE, VERNON VS LOWENTHAL, LARRY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,593.70 FILED BY ROWE, VERNON AS TO DEFENDANT LOWENTHAL, LARRY GILMAN SCREENS AND KITCHENS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOWENTHAL, LARRY
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,715.00 FILED BY LOWENTHAL, LARRY GILMAN SCREENS AND KITCHENS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ROWE, VERNON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF ROWE, VERNON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROWE, VERNON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOWENTHAL, LARRY GILMAN SCREENS AND KITCHENS $4,593.70 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,665.70, DISMISSED AS TO DEFENDANT LARRY LOWENTHAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GILMAN SCREENS AND KITCHENS RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT ROWE, VERNON $1,715.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,737.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT GILMAN SCREENS AND KITCHENS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27354, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROWE, VERNON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GILMAN SCREENS AND KITCHENS $1,605.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,627.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27354 ON 10/22/03 EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LOWENTHAL, LARRY GILMAN SCREENS AND KITCHENS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ROWE, VERNON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF ROWE, VERNON
